response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video from 00:00 to 04:59. 2. Monitored all audio channels for background vocal music or singing. 3. Confirmed the audio consists only of game sound effects (e.g., block breaking, combat sounds) and the voice chat of the players. 4. Determined that no vocal music is present throughout the video. 5. Mapped the entire duration as a single scene with contains_vocal_music set to false.
response.global_summary: This is a video recording of Minecraft gameplay. The video follows a group of players (VTubers) as they navigate through a dungeon, battle various mobs, open chests to find items and keys, and ultimately fight a boss. The audio consists entirely of game sound effects and voice chat commentary. No vocal music is present in the video.

scenes.description: The entire video features Minecraft gameplay, including exploration, combat, and voice chat interaction between players. There is no background vocal music.
